name: Ham and Cheese Ball
recipeIngredient: 1 Jar Old English sharp cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese to room temperature.
2. Sprinkle some onion powder over thinly sliced smoked ham and set aside.
3. Mix the softened cream cheese with the remaining onion powder.
4. Chop the ham finely and place the nuts in a blender.
5. Combine the cheese mixture and chopped nuts, then chill until ready to serve.
